titleStmt.title: SII 31.268: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 268. (A.R. No. B 224 of 1938.) DONḌAPĀḌU (Hamlet of Valasapalle), KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Gōpālasvāmai temple.
This inscription is dated in the cyclic year, Kīlaka, Vaiśāka, śu. 11.

States that Vōbulreḍḍi, Naḷavōbulrēḍḍi, Papavōbulreḍḍi, Pedakoṁḍreḍḍi, the five sons of Siṅgamareḍḍi Timmāreḍḍi and Bhūmāsani constructed the well in the garden of Malināyaka and made a endowment of land as dasavandam for the merit of their parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
kīlaka saṁvatsara
vaiśākha śu 11 lu
doṁḍḍapāṭi śi
ṁgamareḍḍi tiṁmā
reḍḍi komāḷuvō
buḷreḍḍi naḷavōbuḷre
ḍḍi pāpavōluḷreḍḍi
pedakoṁḍreḍḍi cinako
ṁḍreḍḍi jana 5 malināya
kuni tōṁṭa sthalaṁlōnu
grāmamuvāru nīḷluvā
ḍu konu bāvitavviṁ
ci Ātōṁṭasdhaḷaṁ cē
nu Ê 0 � 1 ki tāmu ca
rvukaṭṭiṁcisa dasava
ṁdaṁ cēnu muttuṁ I
runa sdhaḷaṁlōnu peddirā
juṁgāri cēniki dakṣaAṇaṁ
cēnu Ê 0 � nnu dēvuni mā
ṁnyāṁnu Iḍugānu Iccivū
ru vāḍukōnu mātiṁmmi
reḍḍikiṁnni bhūmasāniki
ṁnna puṁṇyaṁgānu tavviṁ
cenu maṁgaḷa mahā
śrīśrīśrīṁjēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 31.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
